tagline: Experience a healthier and safer home with pure, fresh water at every tap

hero.headline: Cape Coral's Water Experts For 25+ Years
hero.subheadline: From crystal-clear pools to pure drinking water, Water Medic handles it all. Our team of 20 certified professionals has earned 741 five-star reviews by treating every home like our own. You relax — we handle the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Water Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Whether it's your swimming pool, well water, or home purification system — Water Medic has the expertise and equipment to keep your water clean, safe, and worry-free.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance & Cleaning
cards.description: Weekly and bi-weekly pool cleaning, chemical balancing, and filter maintenance to keep your pool sparkling and swim-ready year-round in the Florida sun.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, motors, heaters, and salt systems. Most repairs completed same-visit by our certified technicians.

cards.title: Saltwater & Automation Systems
cards.description: Upgrade to a saltwater chlorination system or smart pool automation. Control your pool lighting, temperature, and equipment from your phone.

cards.title: Pool Heater Installation
cards.description: Extend your swimming season with professional heater installation and repair. Enjoy your pool at the perfect temperature, even in cooler months.

cards.title: Well Water Systems
cards.description: Complete well water repair, pump installation, aerators, and air injection systems to ensure your well delivers clean, reliable water every day.

cards.title: Whole Home Water Purification
cards.description: Reverse osmosis systems, water softeners, and salt delivery service. Pure, fresh water at every faucet — protecting your family and your plumbing.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll send a licensed technician to evaluate your pool or water system — no charge, no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Solution
steps.description: We'll recommend the right service plan based on your specific needs — whether it's weekly pool care, a water softener, or a complete purification system.

steps.title: Enjoy Perfect Water
steps.description: Sit back while our team of 20 professionals keeps your pool sparkling and your home water pure. We've been doing this for 25+ years — you're in good hands.

about.label: Why Cape Coral Trusts Water Medic
about.headline: 25 Years of Putting Families First
about.description: Since 1999, Water Medic has been the name Cape Coral families trust for pools, wells, and whole-home water purification. Our team of 20 certified professionals doesn't just service your water — we build relationships that last decades. With 741 five-star reviews and clients who have been with us for 26 years, our track record speaks for itself.

features.title: Licensed Pool & Well Contractors
features.description: State of Florida licensed for both pool service and well water systems. Fully insured with comprehensive liability coverage.

features.title: Full-Service Water Solutions
features.description: Pools, wells, reverse osmosis, water softeners — we handle every water need under one roof so you never juggle multiple contractors.

features.title: Relationships That Last Decades
features.description: Our longest clients have been with us for 26 years. We earn your trust every single visit with honest pricing and reliable service.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every service comes with upfront pricing and honest recommendations. No upsells, no hidden fees — just fair rates from a company that values long-term relationships.

guarantee.headline: Our "Water Medic Promise"
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service we provide, we'll come back and make it right at no additional charge. We've built our reputation over 25 years on doing the job right — and we stand behind every visit, every repair, and every installation until it meets your expectations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new pool maintenance clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent issues like green pools or equipment failures, we offer priority scheduling. Just call us at 239-541-2581 and we'll get you on the calendar fast.

faqs.question: Do you handle both pools and home water systems?
faqs.answer: Yes — that's what makes Water Medic unique. We're licensed for pool service, well water repair, reverse osmosis, and water softener installation. One company for all your water needs, backed by 25+ years of experience in Southwest Florida.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every Water Medic technician is State of Florida licensed, fully insured, and trained in both pool and water purification systems. We're also a BBB Accredited Business with a 4.8-star Google rating.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Cape Coral, Fort Myers, North Fort Myers, Lehigh Acres, Estero, Bonita Springs, and the greater Southwest Florida region. If you're unsure whether we cover your area, give us a call — chances are we do.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: No contracts required. We believe in earning your business every visit. That's why many of our clients have been with us for 10, 15, even 26 years — because they want to be, not because they have to be.

testimonials.name: Thomas B.
testimonials.text: We have used Water Medic for 26 years now. Would never consider any other service. They're reliable, honest, and always do excellent work on our pool and water systems.

testimonials.name: Rich R.
testimonials.text: The entire experience was outstanding from start to finish. The team exceeded our expectations on the pool upgrade. Professional, on-time, and the results speak for themselves.

testimonials.name: Bobby O.
testimonials.text: Dena went above and beyond — literally standing in the rain to complete work properly. It's rare to find a company that cares this much about doing the job right. Highly recommend Water Medic.
